race.comment: CYCLONE COCO (4) was safely held when fifth last time out over 1400m at this track, beaten 7 lengths. That followed a win at Mt Garnet at the previous outing. The engagement of Chelsea Jokic is noteworthy. Looks well placed so expect a better run this time. SKOGAFOSS (5) settled well back from a wide draw last time then wound up strongly to finish fourth over 1250m here. Will drift back but will be getting home hard. BUFFET BUSTER (2) was second up last start and went close, beaten half a length into second at this circuit over 1250m. Has the pace to be in a prominent position from the outset and shapes as one of the main contenders. LA MANO (8) next in line from the inside alley.
